rationale: For an enterprise inventory system, clarity and authority are paramount. We avoid generic 'SaaS blue' and instead use a stark, function-first Swiss design. Color is strictly used as a semantic indicator (Red for alerts, Blue for primary actions). This provides a visually pleasing, highly legible experience that speeds up operational warehouse tasks.

guidelines: No generic sans (Inter/Roboto) for headings. Use Cabinet Grotesk for authoritative, structural layout.
Use JetBrains Mono for SKU codes, quantities, and StockLedger IDs.
Never default to bold for all headers. Use weight contrast (Black vs Regular/Light).
95% of the UI should be monochrome. Color exists ONLY to guide action or indicate status.
Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Grey is tinted.
Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. For alerts, use white text on the #FF3B30 background.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat solid surfaces (#FFFFFF) with sharp 1px border (border-[#E5E5E5]). No drop shadows.
surfaces.headers: Solid background with a hard 1px bottom border. No glassmorphism here, this is a control room.
surfaces.mobile_panels: Subtle border-radius (max 8px) for native feel, generous padding (p-6) for large tap targets.

guidelines: Every pixel utilized. Use 'h-full' on grid children to ensure they stretch. No jagged bottoms.
Use 'border-collapse' style layout for data-heavy sections (Grid Borders look).
Mobile-first responsive. Mobile image heights must not exceed 80vh.

buttons_and_ctas.primary: Solid primary color (#002FA7), stark white text, sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-none), hover:opacity-90.
buttons_and_ctas.mobile: Must have min-height of 56px to 64px for easy thumb tapping with gloves on the warehouse floor.

tables_and_lists.web_sku_table: Dense control room layout. Use customized Shadcn Table. No row borders except bottom. Use Mono font for all SKU strings and ledger counts.
tables_and_lists.mobile_lists: Cardless, full-width rows with a 1px border-b. High contrast.

navigation.web: Collapsible left sidebar. Very minimal, text-heavy.
navigation.mobile: Bottom tab bar + top floating scanner action button.

guidelines: Avoid Shadcn 'Card' wrapper for everything. Use raw divs with specific borders to avoid 'box inside a box' visual clutter.
Use Recharts with sharp, straight lines (type='linear') for velocity charts, no smooth bezier curves.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='receive-stock-btn').

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Regular or Bold (high legibility). No duotone on the warehouse floor.

mobile_specifics.offline_first: Visual indicator for 'Offline Mode' (Warning Yellow pill). Cache badge on sync buttons.
mobile_specifics.barcode_scanning: Camera view should take up 70% of viewport with a stark, high-contrast framing reticle.
mobile_specifics.gestures: Swipe actions for quick 'Approve/Reject' in Cycle Counting.

image_urls.description: Minimalist Swiss design architectural abstract, clean white and light grey geometric warehouse simulation with stark lighting.
Cinematic macro photography of a barcode scanner laser hitting a clean white box.
High-tech automated warehouse system featuring a green robotic arm.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the immutable StockLedger using strict transactional inserts. Current stock is derived, not mutated.
Setup role-based auth routing: Admins to React Web Dashboard, Workers to React Native Mobile Flow.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the dashboard skeleton to achieve the dense 'Control Room' grid layout.
Override default Shadcn styles to remove heavy shadows and large border-radii; enforce max 4px radius and sharp 1px borders.
Ensure all buttons, inputs, and major table rows have the `data-testid` attribute for robust automated testing.
Build the mobile UI with Expo, ensuring touch targets are massive (p-6, min-h-[64px]) for warehouse workers.
